text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The curry goes bubble bubble, the steak goes
sizzle sizzle.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Gah! Bubble... sizzle... N-no, I can't!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's it, Oguri, hold back da urge! This is all for
Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Rice so soft... and fluffy, fluffy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Gahhh! I-I can't take it anymore...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No, Oguri! You promised! Remember Creek's
birthday present?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be "brats in our terrible twos
who refuse to be pampered"! I know it's a
mouthful, but still!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Tamtam, do you have any laundry? Make
sure to put out your jersey and bento box later,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, gimme a break, I can do it myself, Mo—crap,
that was close! Too easy to fall into that trap!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, fluffy fluffy... fluffy fluffy, fluffy! Must...
resist!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's it, you two, you can do it. ♪ Let all the
whining and sulking out. That way...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Later, you can be my pampered little girls. That'll
be the real present, won't it? Teehee. ♪
